decisions.title: Raft schema and rolling migration
decisions.compatibility_window: v3.6.x keeps legacy JSON readers and at least one release keeps the legacy writer rollback path; removal requires a new v3.7+ ADR
decisions.migration_window: disk codec first, then dual-read legacy-write, followed by an explicitly gated protobuf writer while legacy rollback remains available
release_assets: protobuf runtime lockfile and SPDX dependency evidence
mixed-version cluster and state migration summaries
validation_gates: strict wire, disk-state and command codec tests
three-node mixed-version rolling upgrade and rollback
Raft recovery and strict offline release dependency gates

decisions.title: External identity JWKS and multiple kid support
decisions.compatibility_window: static RS256 PEM remains supported throughout v3.6.x; removal or deprecation requires a later ADR
decisions.migration_window: deploy a static multi-kid key ring before enabling bounded JWKS refresh, and retain the static key ring as the independent rollback configuration
release_assets: security gate and refresh observability summary
validation_gates: JWT key selection and malformed claim unit tests
bounded JWKS cache, refresh and failure integration tests
production identity security and rotation drill gates

decisions.title: macOS ARM64 build, test and install support
decisions.compatibility_window: platform remains candidate until same-revision build, install and published-asset gates pass; Linux remains the capacity fact source
decisions.migration_window: land the toolchain and smoke profile first, validate an unpublished archive second, and add the immutable release asset only at candidate freeze
release_assets: macOS ARM64 runtime and C++ SDK archive
validation_gates: native ARM64 Conan and Release build
bounded CTest, SDK and loopback full-flow smoke
Mach-O install and published-asset consumer verification

decisions.title: Python wheel and NuGet distribution
decisions.compatibility_window: source wrappers and explicit native-library loading remain available throughout v3.6.x; SDK 4.x compatibility is retained
decisions.migration_window: validate SDK 4.2.0 candidate packages and GitHub Release assets before independently enabling immutable PyPI or NuGet.org publication
release_assets: per-package SBOM, checksums, provenance and compatibility matrix
validation_gates: reproducible package build and content policy
clean Python and .NET install, uninstall and native resolution
real Gateway full-flow and independent published-asset verification

decisions.title: Independent debug symbol release assets
decisions.compatibility_window: symbols are additive beginning with v3.6; no v3.5.x asset is rebuilt or republished
decisions.migration_window: validate unpublished runtime-symbol pairs before adding both assets and their subject-bound attestations to the required release manifest
release_assets: Linux x64 debug-symbols archive and build-id manifest
validation_gates: ELF strip, debuglink and build-id mapping
runtime regression and independent supply-chain verification
